phrases.text_local: Pode me dizer onde fica o hall de entrada?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih MIH dee-ZEHR OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW AHL DIH ayngt-RAH-duh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Hall de Entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AHL DIH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the main entrance hall.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the main entrance hall.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AHL DIH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Hall de Entrada.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Salão dos Azulejos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW suh-LOWN DOOSH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Salão dos Azulejos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW suh-LOWN DOOSH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Salão dos Azulejos.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Salão dos Azulejos.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW suh-LOWN DOOSH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Salão dos Azulejos.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a plataforma três?
phrases.pronunciation: OHN-jee POH-soo en-kohn-TRAHR ah plah-tah-FOR-mah TREHS

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as plataformas 1 a 4. O acesso é pelo Hall de Entrada, perto das portas de validação.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH pluh-tuh-FOH-ruh-muhsh OOM AH KWAHT-roo. AW uh-SEH-soo EH PEH-loo AHL DIH ayngt-RAH-duh, PEHR-too DUHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DIH vuh-lee-duh-SOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for platforms 1 to 4. Access is through the Entrance Hall, near the validation gates.

responses.english: Follow the signs for platforms 1 to 4. Access is through the Entrance Hall, near the validation gates.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH pluh-tuh-FOH-ruh-muhsh OOM AH KWAHT-roo. AW uh-SEH-soo EH PEH-loo AHL DIH ayngt-RAH-duh, PEHR-too DUHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DIH vuh-lee-duh-SOWN.
responses.local: Siga as placas para as plataformas 1 a 4. O acesso é pelo Hall de Entrada, perto das portas de validação.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach the lost and found
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o serviço de objetos perdidos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW seh-ruh-VEE-soo DIH awb-ZHEH-toosh peh-ruh-DEE-doosh?
phrases.cultural_note: The lost and found office is staffed near the platform validation gates for quick access.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um funcionário da CP.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH seh-PEH.

responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH seh-PEH.
responses.local: Pergunte a um funcionário da CP.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar os Painéis Históricos de Azulejo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR OOSH peye-NEHEESH eesh-TAW-ree-koosh DIH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Salão dos Azulejos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW suh-LOWN DOOSH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Tile Hall.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Tile Hall.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW suh-LOWN DOOSH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Salão dos Azulejos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Salão dos Azulejos is

phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW suh-LOWN DOOSH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh?
phrases.cultural_note: The famous tile hall serves as the main waiting area and is visible immediately upon entry.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Salão dos Azulejos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW suh-LOWN DOOSH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh.

phrases.text_local: Como chego à plataforma três daqui?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh TREHSH duh-KEE?
phrases.cultural_note: Platforms are underground; directional signs guide passengers down from the tile hall.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um funcionário da CP.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH seh-PEH.

responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH seh-PEH.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to reload Andante card
phrases.text_local: Onde posso recarregar o cartão Andante?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo reh-kuh-rih-GAHR AW kuh-ruh-TOWN ahnng-DAHNNG-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: Blue self-service terminals handle Andante reloads quickly without requiring staff assistance.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para Máquinas Andante.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh MAH-kee-nuhsh ahnng-DAHNNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Andante machines.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Andante machines.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh MAH-kee-nuhsh ahnng-DAHNNG-tih.
responses.local: Siga as placas para Máquinas Andante.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o Salão dos Azulejos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW suh-LOWN DOOSH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Salão dos Azulejos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW suh-LOWN DOOSH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Tile Hall.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Tile Hall.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW suh-LOWN DOOSH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Salão dos Azulejos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Salão dos Azulejos is
phrases.text_local: Com licença, onde fica o Salão dos Azulejos?
phrases.pronunciation: KOHM lee-SAYNG-suh, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW suh-LOWN DOOSH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Salão dos Azulejos is the magnificent tiled main hall of São Bento station, famous for its vast azulejo panels depicting Portuguese history.

likely_response.local: No hall de entrada, à sua frente.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO AHL DIH ayngt-RAH-duh, AH SOOUH FRAYNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: In the entrance hall, straight ahead.

responses.english: In the entrance hall, straight ahead.
responses.phonetic: NOO AHL DIH ayngt-RAH-duh, AH SOOUH FRAYNG-tih.
responses.local: No hall de entrada, à sua frente.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which platform for the train to Braga
phrases.text_local: Em que plataforma sai o comboio para Braga?
phrases.pronunciation: AYNG KIH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh SEYE AW koom-BOYOO PUH-ruh BRAH-guh?
phrases.cultural_note: Platform assignments for regional trains to Braga can vary daily; staff verify quickly.

likely_response.local: Consulte os painéis de informação ou pergunte ao funcionário da CP.
likely_response.pronunciation: koong-SOOW-tih OOSH peye-NEHEESH DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOWN OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH seh-PEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Check the information panels or ask the CP clerk.

responses.english: Check the information panels or ask the CP clerk.
responses.phonetic: koong-SOOW-tih OOSH peye-NEHEESH DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOWN OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH seh-PEH.
responses.local: Consulte os painéis de informação ou pergunte ao funcionário da CP.
